revision.comment: per edit request on talk page - remove deleted flag
revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Martinique | flag alias = Flag-of-Martinique.svg | flag alias-nationalist = Flag of the Front National de Libération de la Martinique.svg | flag alias-snake = Snake Flag of Martinique.svg | flag alias-MIM = Bandera del MIM.svg<noinclude><!-- MIM = [[Martinican Independence Movement]] --></noinclude> | flag alias-football = Flag-of-Martinique.svg | flag alias-football-old = Flag of the Territorial Collectivity of Martinique.svg | flag alias-beach soccer = Flag-of-Martinique.svg | flag alias-futsal = Flag-of-Martinique.svg | flag alias-taekwondo = MARTINIQUE TAEKWONDO DRAPEAU.svg | flag alias-2016 = Flag of France.svg | flag alias-2019 = Flag of the Territorial Collectivity of Martinique.svg | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = nationalist | var2 = snake | var3 = MIM | var4 = taekwondo | var5 = 2016 | var6 = 2019 | redir1 = MTQ </noinclude> }}

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Martinique here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Martinique for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Martinique | flag alias = Flag-of-Martinique.svg | flag alias-nationalist = Flag of the Front National de Libération de la Martinique.svg | flag alias-snake = Snake Flag of Martinique.svg | flag alias-MIM = Bandera del MIM.svg<noinclude><!-- MIM = [[Martinican Independence Movement]] --></noinclude> | flag alias-football = Flag-of-Martinique.svg | flag alias-football-old = Flag of the Territorial Collectivity of Martinique.svg | flag alias-beach soccer = Flag-of-Martinique.svg | flag alias-futsal = Flag-of-Martinique.svg | flag alias-taekwondo = MARTINIQUE TAEKWONDO DRAPEAU.svg | flag alias-2016 = Flag of France.svg | flag alias-2019 = Flag of the Territorial Collectivity of Martinique.svg | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = nationalist | var2 = snake | var3 = MIM | var4 = taekwondo | var5 = 2016 | var6 = 2019 | redir1 = MTQ </noinclude> }} <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
